title: Explicit explanation comment for deprecated/retained Python configs
context: Retaining pyproject.toml in a Go migrated repository.
content: When migrating a codebase to Go but retaining pyproject.toml for golden-master pytest suites, write a clear explanatory comment at the top of pyproject.toml instead of deleting it. This preserves the testing harness without confusing future agents or developers regarding the primary codebase language.
